content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Three Pairwise Maximums". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1385/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains three integers a, b, c.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the maximum of the three pairwise maximums.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Compare each pair of numbers and find the maximum of each pair, then find the maximum of these pairwise maximums.

code.Python3:
import sys
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    a, b, c = map(int, input().split())
    max1 = max(a, b)
    max2 = max(b, c)
    max3 = max(a, c)
    result = max(max1, max2)
    result = max(result, max3)
    print(result)
